Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate (Prob. C. 11700)
Off Calendar Dec-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lillian Ng appeared for Evanthia Pallikarkis (petitioner).

Ms. Ng stated that now that the property is sold they can pay back Allen, that they pay off any debt owed, and that she will be ready to file a final distribution. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3347 21st Street, San Francisco, Ca. 94110)
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lillian Ng for petitioner Evanthia Pallikarakis.
Adele Faure, buyer, represented by Robert Morrison (agent) and Edward Milestone (broker).
Alejandra Martino and Richard Decal, overbidders, represented by Luke Billingsly (agent).

The matter was called for hearing on Report of Sale and Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property located at 3347 21st Street, San Francisco, CA 94110.

The Court announced the original bid for the property at $1,050,000, with the first overbid amount set at $1,103,000, with subsequent overbids to proceed in increments of $10,000.

After engaging in the overbid process, the final bid was made by the original buyer in the amount of $1,173,000.

The sale was confirmed at $1,173,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order).

Ms. Ng stated that she would prepare an order and submit it to the court along with a completed overbid form.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing A Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 26, 2014 is admitted to probate. Evanthia Pallikarakis is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing on filing a petition to determine entitlement is set for June 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for February 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
